rulings.Case Title: THE WONG FAMILY TRUST VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABLIZATION AND
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Rent Board'S Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 1, 2012, line 1. Respondent Rent Board'S Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus. Sustain without leave to amend. Liang v. San Francisco Rent Board 124 CA4 775.778 on point. Also 90 days have elapsed per CCP 1094.6(b) and ccp 389(b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN MORIARTY VS. 2363 VAN NESS AVENUE LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 1, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT LARAMAR MANAGEMENT CORPORATION's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Continued to Nov. 29, 2012, court's own motion. Counsel submitted sur reply without court permission. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO TIFFANY GARDENS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATI VS. JOSEPH APONTE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 1, 2012, line 6. Plaintiff'S Judgment On The Pleadings. Deny, defendant's general denial is sufficient where complaint doesn't allege any probative facts as to plaintiff's title other than general allegation of ownership. Morel v. Morel 203CA 417 South Shoreland v. Peterson 226 CA2 725. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN FLOOD et al VS. JAMES YOUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 1, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTs JAMES YOUNG and BETTY YOUNG's AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Deny, failed to show rent increase in contemplation of litigation; sub section 4 not in moving papers. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LUZ HOTEL VS. ALBERT SAMANIEGO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 1, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT ALBERT SAMANIEGO's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend, notice attached to First Amended Complaint was served and expired after Unlawful Detainer was filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. TYAWARRY LYONS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 1, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT TYAWARRY LYONS MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Hearing required to address who Marukece Johns is? = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRIENDS OF NEW COLLEGE LLC VS. QUISQUEYA FAM LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Continuance Of Trial Date And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 1, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT QUISQUEYA FAM LLC's Notice Of Motion For Continuance Of Trial Date. Hearing required re trial date and withdrawl. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRIENDS OF NEW COLLEGE LLC VS. QUISQUEYA FAM LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 1, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT QUISQUEYA FAM LLC's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. Hearing required re trial date and withdrawl. = (501/REQ)
